creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unfortunately, ATM, if you have GnuTLS in the system and compile Samba with disabled AD/DC it'll still link some libs against GnuTLS.

In tainted environment:

./lib/samba4/private/libauthkrb5-samba4.so:
        gnutls-3.5.16
        samba47-4.7.3
        talloc-2.1.10_1
        tevent-0.9.34_1

vs poudriere:

./lib/samba4/private/libauthkrb5-samba4.so:
        samba47-4.7.3
        talloc-2.1.10_1
        tevent-0.9.34_1
